name: Beef Ragu
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Sauté vegetables
steps.content: Sauté all the vegetables in a large pot until aromatic and the onion is slightly golden brown.

steps.title: Add tomatoes & demi glace
steps.content: Add 3 tins of Hossen tomatoes with veal jus and demi glace into the pot and bring to a boil.

steps.title: Grill beef
steps.content: Grill all trimmed beef chuck, season with salt and pepper, then add to the pot.

steps.title: Season
steps.content: Once boiling, add all the seasoning powders and stir properly.

steps.title: Slow cook
steps.content: Lower the heat and cook the beef ragu for about 6 hours.

steps.title: Overnight in oven
steps.content: Set the oven to 86°C and put the ragu in overnight.

steps.title: Separate & blend
steps.content: Separate the pulled beef aside and hand-blend the ragu sauce until smooth.

name: Chili Paste
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil water and chili together in a big pot until totally soft.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Strain the chili and blend it.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let the chili cool down, then keep in the chiller.

name: Harissa Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all the ingredients until smooth.

name: Dry Batter
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all ingredients in a big bowl.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Stir until well mixed and transfer into the container.

name: Beef Sausage Chorizo
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Make sure all is well mixed and portion into sous vide bags.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep inside the chiller.

name: Chicken Rosemary Sausage
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Make sure all is well mixed and portion into sous vide bags.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep inside the chiller.

name: Lamb Merguez Sausage
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients in a mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Make sure all is well mixed and portion into sous vide bags.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep inside the chiller.

name: Pesto Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Mix all ingredients and blend, lastly cover with Parmesan cheese on top.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Keep individually in rectangle containers in the chiller with a label.

name: Pomodoro Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Sauté
steps.content: Sauté the diced onion and garlic.

steps.title: Boil tomato
steps.content: Add whole peeled tomato in a large pot and boil until soft.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Once soft, hand-blend until smooth.

steps.title: Reduce
steps.content: Continue to heat and reduce the sauce.

steps.title: Season
steps.content: Once thick, add all the ingredients and stir until well mixed.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let cool and keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Ceps Stock
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil water in a large pot.

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: Once boiling, pour into a 4 L container, stir and make sure all is well mixed.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let the stock cool and keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Garlic Aioli
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion individually into piping bags (600 g each).

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Truffle Aioli
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe
notes: Source listed salt as '10' with no unit — assumed 10 g.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend or whisk all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion individually into piping bags (600 g each).

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Italian Vinaigrette
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Add to a tall jug and blend until combined.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion individually into piping bags (600 g each).

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Basil Oil
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients about 5 minutes until hot / smoking.

steps.title: Strain & cool
steps.content: Strain and let cool before transferring to a squeeze bottle.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Red Bell Pepper Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Portion individually into rectangle containers, keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Egg Yolk Mix
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Whisk
steps.content: Mix in a mixing bowl and whisk well.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Keep in the chiller with a label.

name: Salted Water
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil water in a large pot.

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: Once boiling, pour into a 6 L cambro, stir and make sure all is well mixed.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Once cool, label and keep at room temperature.

name: Flour Mix
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix in a mixing bowl, whisk well, and it's ready to use.

name: Garlic Confit
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Season & cover
steps.content: Separate into 3 trays, season with salt and black pepper, cover with aluminium foil.

steps.title: Bake
steps.content: Bake in the oven at 180°C for 1 hour.

steps.title: Cool
steps.content: Once done, set aside and let cool.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Strain the garlic and blend until smooth.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Portion into rectangle containers and label accordingly.

name: Tiramisu
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Egg mixture
steps.content: In a large bowl combine 30 egg yolks with 400 g sugar; whisk until pale, thick and creamy. Set aside in the chiller.

steps.title: Coffee
steps.content: Mix 2.4 L hot water with 100 g sugar and 60 g coffee powder; stir well until slightly boiling.

steps.title: Cream mixture
steps.content: Whip 1 kg cream cheese until smooth, gradually add 2 L whip cream to soft peaks, then fold in the egg-sugar mixture to keep it light.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.content: Quickly dip ladyfingers in the warm coffee syrup, layer in a tray, spread tiramisu cream, repeat finishing with cream on top.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Cover and refrigerate at least 4–5 hours (overnight is best) to let the flavours meld.

steps.title: Serve
steps.content: Before serving, dust generously with cocoa powder.

name: Alfredo Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Cook
steps.content: Weigh Parmesan powder, salt and cream into a medium pot; slow-cook until slightly thickened.

steps.title: Cool
steps.content: Once done, set aside and let cool.

name: Apricot Basil Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: In a 1/6 container weigh the apricot jam and alfredo sauce.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Stir, then finish with sliced basil; set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Teriyaki Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: In a 1/6 container weigh the teriyaki sauce and alfredo sauce; stir.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Harissa Pomodoro
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine
steps.content: In a 1/6 container weigh the pomodoro sauce and harissa; stir.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Corn Salsa
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Prep
steps.content: Dice the red onion, coriander leaf and jalapeño.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix everything in a large mixing bowl.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Package in suitable containers, label accordingly and keep in the chiller / freezer.

name: Roux
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Melt butter
steps.content: Slowly heat the butter until melted, then start to add the flour.

steps.title: Cook
steps.content: Stir continuously. Once done, set aside and let cool. Label accordingly.

name: Tipo Lasagna
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Prep tray
steps.content: Preheat the oven to 180°C and lightly grease a deep baking tray.

steps.title: Base layer
steps.content: Spread a thin layer of pesto béchamel at the base of the tray.

steps.title: Layer
steps.content: Arrange lasagna sheets to cover the sauce, spread béchamel, sprinkle Parmesan and mozzarella; repeat finishing with cheese on top.

steps.title: Bake covered
steps.content: Cover with foil and bake 30 minutes.

steps.title: Bake uncovered
steps.content: Remove foil and bake another 15–20 minutes until golden.

steps.title: Rest
steps.content: Rest 10 minutes to allow the layers to set.

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Cut into 3 cm × 3 cm portions with straight, even cuts before serving.

name: Whipped Feta
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Temper
steps.content: Bring the cream cheese and feta to room temperature and crumble the feta.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend the cream cheese and feta until smooth and creamy.

steps.title: Add cream
steps.content: Add the cream and mix until light and spreadable.

steps.title: Sweeten & season
steps.content: Add honey and mix; season with salt and white pepper and mix well.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Taste, adjust seasoning, and chill before serving.

name: Pesto Béchamel Sauce
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe
notes: Source listed cinnamon and white pepper as '1' with no unit — assumed 1 g; bay leaf as 1 piece.

steps.title: Sauté onion
steps.content: Add yellow onion and sauté gently until soft and fragrant.

steps.title: Add roux
steps.content: Add the roux and cook briefly to combine with the onion.

steps.title: Add milk
steps.content: Gradually add milk while whisking to avoid lumps; bring to a gentle simmer.

steps.title: Aromatics
steps.content: Add the bay leaf and a pinch of cinnamon; cook until the sauce thickens.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Stir in the pesto, season with salt and white pepper, mix well, remove the bay leaf before use.

name: Bacon Bits
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Heat oil
steps.content: Heat the cooking oil in a pan over medium heat.

steps.title: Fry
steps.content: Add the beef bacon and fry until crispy and well rendered.

steps.title: Drain
steps.content: Remove and drain excess oil before use. Label accordingly.

name: Caramelised Cherry Tomatoes
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Preheat
steps.content: Preheat the combi oven to 180°C in bake mode.

steps.title: Toss
steps.content: Toss the cherry tomatoes with pomace oil, salt, black pepper and honey.

steps.title: Bake
steps.content: Spread on a tray and bake 5–7 minutes until caramelised and slightly blistered.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Once cool, transfer to a container and label accordingly.

name: Lemon Capers Aioli
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Place mayonnaise, capers, lemon juice and salt in a jug; blend until smooth and fine.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Taste and adjust seasoning before serving. Label accordingly.

name: Oil Mixture
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Combine herbs
steps.content: In a small bowl combine the chopped basil, parsley and chilli flakes.

steps.title: Add parmesan
steps.content: Add the Parmesan powder and mix evenly.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Drizzle in the balsamic glaze and stir gently to combine. Label accordingly.

name: Pasta Cooking Times (Reference)
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe
notes: Reference card — boiling times by pasta shape (no ingredients).

steps.title: Mafalde
steps.content: Mafalde — 6 minutes.

steps.title: Gemelli
steps.content: Gemelli — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Conchiglie
steps.content: Conchiglie — 4 minutes.

steps.title: Fusilli
steps.content: Fusilli — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Fettuccine
steps.content: Fettuccine — 2 minutes.

steps.title: Linguine
steps.content: Linguine — 3 minutes.

steps.title: Creste
steps.content: Creste — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Radiatori
steps.content: Radiatori — 5 minutes.

steps.title: Campanelle
steps.content: Campanelle — 5 minutes.

name: Truffle Tramezzini
description: Tipo Pasta Bar (Waterloo / Aliwal) — production recipe

steps.title: Slice
steps.content: Slice the brioche loaf into 2 cm slices and trim the edges.

steps.title: Butter
steps.content: Spread 10 g Planta evenly on one side of each brioche slice.

steps.title: Fill
steps.content: Spread truffle aioli, add mozzarella (1 slice each side), then 10 g beef bacon.

steps.title: Wrap
steps.content: Close with the second slice, buttered sides facing outward, press gently and cling-wrap individually. Label before chilling.

steps.title: Toast
steps.content: Trim the bread sides, cut into triangle tramezzini, then toast in the oven at 180°C for 4 minutes until golden brown.

steps.title: Build
steps.content: Add 90ml caramel syrup to a glass full of ice.

steps.title: Top with soda
steps.content: Fill with soda water to the top of the handle and mix well.

steps.title: Finish
steps.content: Top with butterbeer cream to the brim of the mug.

name: Butterbeer Cream
notes: Source listed ingredients only; method is the standard prep.

steps.title: Whip
steps.content: Combine whipping cream, icing sugar and butterscotch sauce; whip to a smooth, pourable cream.

name: Caramel Syrup
notes: Source listed ingredients only; method is the standard prep.

steps.title: Dissolve
steps.content: Dissolve the sugar in the hot water.

steps.title: Colour
steps.content: Add a splash of brown food colouring and mix well.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend all ingredients for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Garnish
steps.content: Garnish with mint and lemon.

steps.title: Brew
steps.content: Cold-brew 12 Earl Grey tea bags with 4 rosemary stalks, 1 lemon and 300g sugar.

steps.title: Serve
steps.content: Fill a glass full of ice and top with cold brew tea to the brim.

steps.title: Garnish
steps.content: Garnish with rosemary and lemon.

name: Coffee
notes: Four espresso builds on one card.

steps.title: Iced Black
steps.content: Mug full of ice, ¾ water, 2 shots of espresso.

steps.title: Iced White
steps.content: Mug full of ice, ¾ milk, 2 shots of espresso.

steps.title: Hot White
steps.content: Single shot of espresso topped with steamed milk.

steps.title: Hot Black
steps.content: Single shot of espresso topped with hot water.

steps.title: Custard base
steps.content: Mix instant custard powder, ice water and vanilla essence until smooth.

steps.title: Whip cream
steps.content: Whip the whipping cream until soft peaks.

steps.title: Fold
steps.content: Fold the custard and whipped cream together until well incorporated.

steps.title: Layer
steps.content: Layer banana, crushed biscuits and the custard mixture.

steps.title: Chill
steps.content: Let it sit in the fridge for at least 4 hours before serving.

steps.title: Plate
steps.content: Serve 1 scoop (≈200g) of the banana pudding.

steps.title: Garnish
steps.content: Drizzle with butterscotch sauce and dust with icing sugar.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Pour all ingredients into a large mixing bowl and stir until evenly mixed.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Transfer into a large vacuum bag and seal.

steps.title: Chop
steps.content: Separately pulse onions, celery and leeks in a food processor until finely chopped.

steps.title: Sauté
steps.content: Heat oil in a large pot and sauté all chopped vegetables until tender — do not brown.

steps.title: Cool & pack
steps.content: Cool the mirepoix, then pack into individual 1kg vacuum bags.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Store in the freezer.

steps.title: Heat mirepoix
steps.content: Defrost 1 bag of mirepoix and heat in a pot with a little canola oil.

steps.title: Stock
steps.content: Mix vegetable stock powder and sugar into the water and pour into the pot.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.content: Add milk, cream, bay leaf and thyme. Bring to a simmer.

steps.title: Add clams & potato
steps.content: Roughly dice the cooked potatoes and add with the clam meat. Bring to a simmer.

steps.title: Thicken
steps.content: Dilute corn flour with a little water, pour in, and keep stirring until the chowder thickens.

steps.title: Chop
steps.content: Pulse the white onion in a food processor until finely chopped.

steps.title: Sauté
steps.content: Heat oil in a big pot and sauté the onions until translucent.

steps.title: Cook flour
steps.content: Add curry powder, then plain flour, and stir to cook off the raw flour.

steps.title: Stock
steps.content: Mix vegetable stock powder and sugar into the water, pour in, and bring to a simmer.

steps.title: Season
steps.content: Add HP sauce and mango chutney.

steps.title: Cool
steps.content: Cool fully before storing in the chiller.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Place all ingredients in a mixing bowl and whisk until evenly mixed. Transfer to a container for storage.

steps.title: Chop
steps.content: Pulse gherkin, gherkin juice, capers and dill in a food processor until finely chopped.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl with the white grape vinegar and fish sauce.

steps.title: Store
steps.content: Transfer to a container and keep in the chiller.

steps.title: Pickling liquid
steps.content: Place all pickling ingredients in a mixing bowl and stir until evenly mixed.

steps.title: Prep eggs
steps.content: Drain the canned quail eggs and rinse with tap water.

steps.title: Pickle
steps.content: Add the eggs to the pickling liquid and pickle for at least 6 hours.

steps.title: Drain
steps.content: Drain 2.5kg tin chickpeas. Keep some of the chickpea juice for blending if needed. Once drained, chickpea should weigh roughly 1.5kg.

steps.title: Pour
steps.content: Pour in all the ingredients into the chopper and blend till smooth.

steps.title: Alternate
steps.content: Alternate peel the cucumbers.

steps.title: Cut
steps.content: Cut both ends, then cut into halves.

steps.title: Take
steps.content: Take out all the seeds.

steps.title: Put
steps.content: Put the deseeded half cucumbers into the chopper and blend till fine.

steps.title: Use
steps.content: Use a fine sieve to drain out the excess cucumber juices.

steps.title: Keep
steps.content: Keep the cucumber ‘pulp’ or ‘meat’ and throw the juice.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix the cucumber pulp into a mixing bowl together with all the other ingredients.

steps.title: Soak
steps.content: Soak the breadcrumbs with the milk in a mayo tub and leave it overnight. If soaked during opening, at night can blend already.

steps.title: Pour
steps.content: Pour the soaked breadcrumbs into the chopper together with the tarama and lime juice.

steps.title: Pulse
steps.content: Pulse the mixture till blended.

steps.title: Pour
steps.content: Pour in the canola oil into the mixture bit by bit to emulsify (means pour, blend pour, blend and repeat)

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend till the dip is smooth and thick and able to hold its shape. If still unable to hold its shape, add more oil bit by bit.

steps.title: If
steps.content: If recipe requires 215g of roasted capsicum, weigh about 300g to 400g to roast on the grill. So there’s about 100g reduction weight loss.

steps.title: Roast
steps.content: Roast the red capsicum till charred on all sides.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once roasted, put in a container and cover with a cling wrap to further steam and cook till soft and tender.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once cooled and softened, peel and throw the charred skin.

steps.title: I
steps.content: i) If the feta is very solid and hard (if using alba brand), cut into small pieces, put into the chopper and blend together with the ricotta till smooth.

steps.title: Ii
steps.content: ii) If the feta is not hard (if using epiros brand), crumble into the chopper and blend together with the ricotta till smooth.

steps.title: Put
steps.content: Put the roasted capsicum and the rest of the ingredients including the oil till smooth.

steps.title: Make
steps.content: Make sure dip looks very easy to shape. Pour into a container and set in the chiller overnight.

steps.title: Poke
steps.content: Poke the eggplants and aubergine and roast them on the grill till soft and charred. No need to be too charred like super black charred.

steps.title: Roast
steps.content: Roast the red capsicums till charred as well.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once roasted, put them in a full insert and cling wrap to further cook and soften it.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once done, peel all the skin and the head.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend the eggplants and aubergine separately. Blend till chunky smooth.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend the roasted red capsicum together with the other ingredients except parsley and onion.

steps.title: Pour
steps.content: Pour all the blended ingredients and parsley and onion in a full insert. Mix well.

steps.title: Taste
steps.content: Taste and add more red grape vinegar and salt if needed.

steps.title: Drain
steps.content: Drain the 400g chickpea tin and throw the juice.

steps.title: In
steps.content: In a separate bowl, mix the other ingredients together. Then, put in the chickpeas and mix well.

steps.title: Roast
steps.content: Roast them in a tray at 178℃ for 40mins, then at 160℃ for 8mins.

steps.title: Leave
steps.content: Leave the butter at room temperature to soften.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix the softened butter together with all the ingredients.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix well together

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix well together

steps.title: Drain
steps.content: Drain the kalamata olives and the sundried tomato.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend everything in a chopper till almost smooth and able to hold its shape.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend everything and pour in the oil bit by bit till emulsify

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend everything and pour in the oil bit by bit till emulsify

steps.title: Wash
steps.content: Wash the basmati rice a few times.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all ingredients except coriander/parsley, raisin and orzo and cook in a rice cooker.

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil orzo in salted water (see cooking time on packaging).

steps.title: Chop
steps.content: Chop coriander/parsley finely.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once rice and orzo cooked, mix them with chopped coriander/parsley and raisin.

steps.title: Portioned
steps.content: Portioned them into bags of 120g.

steps.title: Step
steps.content: —-> Set lunch bowl 120g, power bowl 150g, ala carte 240g

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all together

name: Shakshuka
notes: Yellow onion (sliced): range 2-3 nos  •  Red capsicum (sliced): range 2-3 nos

steps.title: Slice
steps.content: Slice and saute the yellow onions and red capsicums.

steps.title: Add
steps.content: Add in the minced garlic.

steps.title: Pour
steps.content: Pour in the chopped tin tomato and the spices and seasoning.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once boiling, put to simmer till shakhsuka is thickened. Stir once in a while to not have burnt bottom.

steps.title: Taste
steps.content: Taste and adjust if needed.

steps.title: Portioned
steps.content: Portioned in bags of 250g

steps.title: Cut
steps.content: Cut whole chicken into half, remove the bone/spine and keep in freezer to make stock.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all ingredients well and marinate chicken halves well.

steps.title: Put
steps.content: Put in a full insert and store in chiller.

steps.title: Remove
steps.content: Remove lamb loin from the bones and cap (fats).

steps.title: Portion
steps.content: Portion them 180g - 200g.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the spices well and rub onto the portioned lamb loins.

steps.title: Vacuum
steps.content: Vacuum pack each portion.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix everything well.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix everything well.

steps.title: Roughly
steps.content: Roughly chop the yellow onion and blend in the chopper till fine.

steps.title: Press
steps.content: Press and squeeze the onion by using a fine sieve and throw away the onion water.

steps.title: Use
steps.content: Use the pressed onion and mix well together with the rest of the ingredients till no breadcrumbs is visible.

steps.title: Weigh
steps.content: Weigh each portion of kofta at 100g and shape into a rugby ball.

steps.title: Roast
steps.content: Roast the red capsicum till charred on all sides. Cling wrap in a container to steam it. Peel off the charred skin and dice finely.

steps.title: Roughly
steps.content: Roughly chop the yellow onion and blend in the chopper till fine.

steps.title: Press
steps.content: Press and squeeze the onion by using a fine sieve and throw away the onion water.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix well all the ingredients till no breadcrumbs including the pressed onion, chopped parsley and diced roasted red capsicum is visible.

steps.title: Weigh
steps.content: Weigh each portion of kofta at 105g and shape into a rugby ball.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend the tin chopped tomatoes.

steps.title: Put
steps.content: Put everything in a pot and boil.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once boiling, put down to simmer till thicken.

steps.title: Stir
steps.content: Stir once in a while so that sauce would not stick to the pot.

steps.title: Taste
steps.content: Taste and adjust if needed.

steps.title: Strain
steps.content: Strain the boneless chicken.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix all the ingredients for the marination.

steps.title: Marinade
steps.content: Marinade the chicken well. Make sure all parts of the chicken are coated with the marination.

steps.title: Measure
steps.content: Measure in 3 separate bowls; water, sugar and yeast, plain flour.

steps.title: Mix
steps.content: Mix in the sugar and yeast in the bowl of water. After that, mix in the plain flour and beat it in a circular and outward motion till mixture is smooth.

steps.title: Rest
steps.content: Rest in a warm environment for 90mins.

steps.title: Once
steps.content: Once 90min is done, beat it 1 more time and transfer to a mayo tub.

steps.title: Pour
steps.content: Pour everything in a pot and boil.

steps.title: Boil
steps.content: Boil till for 15mins.

steps.title: Test
steps.content: Test thickness and runniness of the syrup by using the back of the spoon. Draw a line and if the line remains for few seconds, its done.

steps.title: If
steps.content: If the syrup very thick once cooled, add a bit of hot water to loosen it up. Make sure the syrup is not too runny, not too thick.
